title: Rubus rivularis microgene horridulus
intro:
Unfortunately, I couldn't find any information about the plant Rubus rivularis microgene horridulus. However, I can provide information on the plant Rubus species in general, as they are a large group of plants commonly known as brambles or raspberries.

Rubus species are a type of thorny shrub that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The health benefits of Rubus species, particularly Rubus idaeus (raspberry), include high antioxidant content and potential anti-inflammatory and anti-cancer properties. The bioactive constituents of Rubus species include phenolic acids, anthocyanins, flavonoids, and ellagic acid. The most common herbal preparations made with Rubus species include teas, tinctures, and extracts, often used to support cardiovascular health, digestive function, and immune system function.

If you have any more information about the specific plant Rubus rivularis microgene horridulus, I may be able to provide more specific information.
